# Data Model: sdHdrFix


SDSS BOSS sdHdrFix header fix Parameter File


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example PAR List](#example-par-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
Parameter file containing header fixes for SDSS BOSS observations

### Naming Convention
$SDSSCORE_DIR/[OBS]/sdHdrfix/sdHdrFix-[MJD].par

### Releases
IPL4, DR20

### Enviroments
SDSSCORE_DIR

### Approximate Size
355 bytes

### File Type
PAR

### Generated by Product
idlspec2d

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
0.3.0

### PAR List for release DR20
  - [OPHDRFIX](#OPHDRFIX)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
 - DR20
   - from: IPL4
   - note: No changes

---
## Example PAR List
### Comments
```
#%yanny
#
# sdHdrFix-60006.par
#
# Created by pydl.pydlutils.yanny.yanny
#
# 2023-03-06 22:28:13 UTC
#
```

### Header

Key | Value | Comment | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| MJD | 60006 | MJD of observation |
| OBS | LCO | Observatory of observation |


### Tables


#### OPHDRFIX
- Description: Table of header fixes for SDSS BOSS observations
- Number of Rows: 2

#### Structure
Name | Type | Unit | Description | Is Array | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
 | fileroot | char[20] |  | BOSS sdR raw fits file root name (with potential wildcards for camera and spectrograph) | False | sdR-??-00009453 |
 | keyword | char[9] |  | Fits header keyword to be fixed | False | HEAR |
 | value | char[80] |  | New value for the keyword | False | 1 1 1 1 |


---
## Notes
pre-SDSSV FPS files were stored in the speclog product, but moved the SDSSCORE product with the replacement of the plugmap files with the fps confSummary files in SDSSV.

---
## Regrets
I  have no regrets!
